title: Key concepts: Peasant revolts
description: Check your knowledge on the history of peasant revolts!
topic_path: European Middle Ages: feudalism and serfdom

hints: Peasants had legal rights that gave them certain freedoms.
Revolts usually seek to overturn the existing political framework.

assessment_items.question_content:
The **plague** impacted the economy of late medieval by

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The price of labor tends to increase as the supply decreases.

choices.content: decreasing the population and making labor cheaper
decreasing the population and making labor more expensive
increasing the population, making labor cheaper

assessment_items.question_content:
Wage laws were passed after the plague to

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: These laws were passed almost immediately following the end of the plague outbreak.

choices.content: protect laborers’ rights to contract with any employer they wanted
ensure that all laborers’ had steady employment and pay
keep laborers’ wages at pre-plague levels

hints: The rebel forces of the Jacquerie included a variety of people, including several nobles.

choices.content: showed that the elites saw the lower classes as a singular group
